final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night 杭州 self-guided itinerary, with landmark illustrations floating on cardstock.

Style/medium: needs a "travel-attack-card" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Japanese 攻略本 print tradition, Lonely Planet illustrated city brochures, 1990s Hong Kong tourism foldouts; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real 杭州 map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, landmark icons floating above cardstock with drop shadows
Subject: must include all scenic spots and content across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 — 西湖经典游: 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺
  Day 2 — 禅意杭州: 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰 / 法喜寺 / 宋城
  Day 3 — 九溪烟树: 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径
  Day 4A — 运河文艺线: 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺
  Day 4B — 西溪湿地: 周家村 / 深潭口 / 西溪湿地
Scene/backdrop: must use a real 杭州 geographic map as the background spine, with all day-routes visually connected across panels
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-guide atmosphere — exact mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet refined palette evoking 江南 scenery — exact color selection is yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock cutout style with floating drop shadows beneath each landmark illustration
Text (verbatim): must include the following itinerary copy verbatim across panels —
  第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南
  路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺
  建议时间：7:30出发 | 午餐推荐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁），人均150元
  第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵
  路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城
  晚餐推荐：素描餐厅（榴莲烤鸡+焦糖布丁），人均90元
  第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人
  路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径
  晚餐推荐：茶人村（私房桂鱼+香芋煲），人均120元
  第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面
  方案A：拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺
  方案B：周家村→深潭口（非诚勿扰取景地）→氦气球俯瞰湿地（180元）
  伴手礼：南宋胡记荷花酥（38元/盒）、万事利丝绸方巾（150-300元）
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of 杭州; all 4 day-panels must be visible in the unfolded tri-fold; all 景点 listed above must be represented; Day 4 must show both 方案A and 方案B options
Avoid: generic tourist map style without illustrated landmarks; flat layout without cardstock floating effect
